title: JointPolarities Property
see_also:
Applies To

Force Motion Restriction Object FMR#

Comments

Sets or returns for each axis whether the force motion restriction is activated or inactivated when values correspond to or do not correspond with threshold values.
examples: FSet FMR1.JointEnabled, True, True, True, True, True, True FSet FMR1.JointPolarities, FG_OUT, FG_OUT, FG_OUT, FG_OUT, FG_OUT, FG_OUT FSet FMR1.JointLowerLevels, -90, -90, -90, -90, -90, -90 FSet FMR1.JointUpperLevels, 90, 90, 90, 90, 90, 90 Trap 1, FMR1 Call ForceError
